use_cases: Landing page hero for blockchain or consciousness-focused platforms seeking immersive 3D visuals
Premium SaaS product showcases requiring high visual impact and modern aesthetics
Crypto or Web3 brand introductions with mystical crystal-themed branding
Creator tools landing pages needing eye-catching hero sections to capture attention
Media or content platforms showcasing premium content with engaging hero animations
ai_summary: Crystal Forge Hero is an immersive 3D hero section featuring real-time crystal/gem rendering with Three.js, bloom post-processing effects, and staggered text animations. The dark, glass-morphic aesthetic with glowing bloom creates a premium, consciousness-focused visual experience ideal for fintech, crypto, and SaaS landing pages requiring high visual impact.
